title: Preparation of 0.1M Tris HCl, pH 6.4
author: Nicola O'Reilly
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfeyjjfw

steps.title: Please select between the recipes for 1 L 0
steps.instruction: Please select between the recipes for 1 L 0.1M Tris HCl pH 6.4 and 5 L 0.1M Tris HCl pH 6.4 . Work in fume hood!

steps.title: Weigh out 15
steps.instruction: Weigh out 15.76 g, Tris HCl and add to a 1 L beaker.

steps.title: Measure out 800 mL, milliQ water...
steps.instruction: Measure out 800 mL, milliQ water and add to the beaker.

steps.title: Add a magnetic flea and place...
steps.instruction: Add a magnetic flea and place on a magnetic stirring plate to mix the solution.

steps.title: Add a newly calibrated pH meter...
steps.instruction: Add a newly calibrated pH meter into the solution to observe the pH.

steps.title: Transfer to a 1 L graduated...
steps.instruction: Transfer to a 1 L graduated cylinder and make up to 1000 ml using milliQ water . Swirl.

steps.title: Label with batch number and date
steps.instruction: Label with batch number and date.

steps.title: Store 1 L, 0
steps.instruction: Store 1 L, 0.1 M Tris HCl, pH 6.4 solution at Room temperature ( 15 °C – 25 °C ).

steps.title: Weigh out 78
steps.instruction: Weigh out 78.8 g, Tris HCl and add to a 5 L beaker.

steps.title: Measure out 4 L, milliQ water...
steps.instruction: Measure out 4 L, milliQ water and add to the beaker.

steps.title: Add a magnetic flea and place...
steps.instruction: Add a magnetic flea and place on a magnetic stirring plate to mix the solution.

steps.title: Add a newly calibrated pH meter...
steps.instruction: Add a newly calibrated pH meter into the solution to observe the pH.

steps.title: Make up to 5 L using...
steps.instruction: Make up to 5 L using milliQ water by transferring to a second 5 L beaker via a 2 L graduated cylinder. Swirl.

steps.title: Label with batch number and date
steps.instruction: Label with batch number and date.

steps.title: Store 0
steps.instruction: Store 0.1 Molarity (M), Tris HCl , pH 6.4 solution at Room temperature ( 15 °C – 25 °C ).
